title: Brave blocks ads and still earns 830 crore rupees every year!
description:
Brave browser blocks YouTube and Google ads completely — and earns over 830 crore rupees a year doing it. Google has never filed a case against Brave, and the reason is simple — ad blocking is 100% legal. In 2015, Germany’s Supreme Court confirmed it. Courts have also flagged that YouTube secretly scanning for ad blockers without user consent may itself be illegal. And Brave’s business model flips the entire system — instead of Google getting paid for your attention, Brave pays you in BAT cryptocurrency to watch privacy-safe ads. 70% of ad revenue goes directly to the user. Google never shared a single rupee.
#Shorts #BraveBrowser #GooglevsYoutube #AdBlocker #TechFacts
